title: The cess, drained
subtitle: Every working library cess falls before 1993
caption: The nineteen State Public Libraries Acts by year of enactment and funding instrument, read from the bare-act texts. Only six carry an operative cess — and all six sit inside the 1948–1993 “cess era.” Only one Act, Kerala's (1989, ringed in blue), written on the back of a mass library movement, builds in mandatory representation for Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes and women.

config.starNote: Only Act to mandate SC/ST + women representation.
